name: @builders-stack/provision
description: CLI that acquires + validates + stores the API keys / root credentials a builders-stack repo needs (reading .env.example as the var manifest), then optionally auto-provisions cloud projects. Root creds live in ~/.builders-stack (reused across repos, à la ~/.aws/credentials); per-repo values are upserted into .env.local without clobbering. May import libs/*; never apps/services.
